page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Comic Anthology - TRAITOROUS ANGEL
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Movic on 10 July 1996. http://rei.in.coocan.jp/evabooks/tritorous.html 

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN ‎4896012402
ISBN-13: ISBN ‎978-4896012408
